texto: What just cause can be found for the encounter of so many nations, or what hatred inspired them all to take arms against each other? It is proof that the human race lives for its kings, for it is at the mad impulse of one mind a slaughter of nations takes place, and at the whim of a haughty ruler that which nature has taken ages to produce perishes in a moment.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jordanes que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “What just cause can be found for the encounter of so many nations, or what hatred inspired them a…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, history, narrative, com foco em inspiracao e narrative.
